_comment: Golden vectors pinning redaction CHUNK GEOMETRY across the Rust and TypeScript implementations. The reveal mask is the most load-bearing value in the redaction producer flow: if the client-side computeRevealMask (app/public-ui/src/hooks/useRedactionCreate.ts) drifts from the server-side redact_chunk_aligned (src-tauri/src/zk/redact.rs) by even one chunk, the issued bundle silently fails to verify. Both sides assert against this file: TS in redactionGeometry.conformance.test.ts, Rust in redact.rs::geometry_golden_vectors. Geometry: chunk_size = ceil(n/16), 16 chunks; chunk i = [i*chunk_size, min(i*chunk_size+chunk_size, n)); a chunk is hidden (mask 0) iff it is non-empty AND overlaps any redacted range [start,end) (start < chunk_end && chunk_start < end). Edit this file only alongside both implementations.

vectors.name: short n=5 (cs=1, only first 5 chunks populated)
n=33 non-divisible, redact ONLY the last partial chunk (must NOT be all-redacted)
n=33 non-divisible, range straddling chunks 1 and 2 (cs=3)
